activity_templates.name: Rome City Walking Tour
activity_templates.description: A relaxed small-group walking tour covering the Trevi Fountain, Spanish Steps, Pantheon, and Piazza Navona with a local guide.

activity_templates.name: Colosseum & Roman Forum Guided Tour
activity_templates.description: Skip-the-line access to the Colosseum, Roman Forum, and Palatine Hill with an expert historian guide and headsets included.

activity_templates.name: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel Early Access
activity_templates.description: Enter the Vatican Museums before general opening hours and enjoy a guided visit including the Sistine Chapel and St. Peter’s Basilica.

activity_templates.name: Trastevere Evening Food Tour
activity_templates.description: Taste Roman street food, pasta, wines, and gelato in the charming Trastevere neighborhood with a local foodie guide.

activity_templates.name: Uffizi Gallery Highlights Tour
activity_templates.description: Skip-the-line tour of the Uffizi Gallery focusing on masterpieces by Botticelli, Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael.

activity_templates.name: Florence Renaissance Walking Tour
activity_templates.description: Discover Florence’s historic center, including the Duomo, Piazza della Signoria, and Ponte Vecchio with a licensed guide.

activity_templates.name: Grand Canal Boat Tour
activity_templates.description: Cruise along Venice’s Grand Canal in a small motorboat, passing under iconic bridges and learning the city’s history.

activity_templates.name: Venice Canal Boat Tour
activity_templates.description: A scenic canal boat tour through Venice’s quieter waterways, ideal as an introduction to the city’s layout and stories.

activity_templates.name: Shibuya Night Food Tour
activity_templates.description: Sample yakitori, ramen, and Japanese sweets in Shibuya’s lively backstreets with a bilingual local guide.

activity_templates.name: Sumo Stable Morning Visit
activity_templates.description: Observe a real sumo training session at a Tokyo stable and learn about sumo traditions and lifestyle.

activity_templates.name: Fushimi Inari Guided Hike
activity_templates.description: Follow a guide through the famous torii gates of Fushimi Inari Shrine and lesser-known forest trails.

activity_templates.name: Louvre Museum Skip-the-Line Tour
activity_templates.description: See the Mona Lisa and other masterpieces on a guided Louvre visit with fast-track entrance.

activity_templates.name: Gaudí Modernism Walking Tour
activity_templates.description: Explore the Eixample district and admire Gaudí’s Casa Batlló, Casa Milà, and Sagrada Família from the outside.

activity_templates.name: Met Museum & Central Park Combo Tour
activity_templates.description: Guided highlights tour of the Metropolitan Museum of Art followed by an easy walking tour through Central Park.

blog_articles.title: Top 10 Paris Museums for First-Time Visitors
blog_articles.excerpt: From the Louvre to the Musée d’Orsay, here are the must-see Paris museums to add to your first trip.
blog_articles.content: Planning your first trip to Paris? The city’s museums can feel overwhelming. In this guide, we narrow it down to the 10 essential Paris museums, including the Louvre, Musée d’Orsay, Centre Pompidou, and more, with tips on when to visit, how to skip the lines, and how to combine them into a perfect Paris museums weekend.

blog_articles.title: A Local's Guide to Hidden Paris Museums
blog_articles.excerpt: Skip the crowds and discover the small, character-filled museums Parisians actually visit.
blog_articles.content: Beyond the Louvre and Musée d’Orsay lies a world of intimate Paris museums. From the Musée Rodin’s sculpture gardens to the quirky Musée de la Chasse et de la Nature, we share 8 hidden museums that are perfect for a relaxed Paris weekend.

blog_articles.title: Paris Museum Pass: Is It Worth It for a Weekend?
blog_articles.excerpt: We crunch the numbers on the Paris Museum Pass for a 2–3 day trip focused on museums.
blog_articles.content: If you’re planning a short Paris museums itinerary, the Paris Museum Pass can save you both time and money. We break down what’s included, how much you’ll really save, and sample 2-day and 3-day Paris Weekend routes that maximize your pass.

blog_articles.title: Family-Friendly Museums in Paris for Rainy Days
blog_articles.excerpt: Keep kids entertained with these interactive Paris museums that are perfect for a rainy afternoon.
blog_articles.content: Traveling to Paris with children? These hands-on museums—like the Cité des Sciences and Musée d’Histoire Naturelle—offer kid-approved exhibits, play areas, and family tickets. We share practical tips for planning a Paris weekend packed with museum fun.

blog_articles.title: Travel Insurance Comparison: How to Choose the Right Plan in 2025
blog_articles.excerpt: We compare basic, standard, and premium travel insurance plans so you know exactly what you’re paying for.
blog_articles.content: Not all travel insurance is created equal. In this 2025 travel insurance comparison, we explain the differences between basic, standard, and premium tiers, including coverage limits, medical benefits, and trip cancellation rules. Use our side-by-side charts, then click through to our Travel Insurance services page to configure your own policy.

blog_articles.title: Budget Weekend in Rome: Save on Hotels and Gelato
blog_articles.excerpt: How to enjoy Rome’s classics—Colosseum, Vatican, and Trastevere—without overspending on hotels or food.
blog_articles.content: Rome can be surprisingly affordable with the right neighborhood and hotel filters. We show you how to find family-friendly hotels with free breakfast and Wi-Fi, when to travel for lower prices, and which cheap eats are actually worth crossing town for.

blog_articles.title: How to Plan a 7-Day Japan Highlights Tour
blog_articles.excerpt: Only a week in Japan? Here’s how to split your time between Tokyo, Kyoto, and a day trip without feeling rushed.
blog_articles.content: We break down a realistic 7-day Japan itinerary with sample guided tours, rail passes, and hotel categories—from budget 2-star to comfortable 3-star options—so you can decide which level fits your style and wallet.

blog_articles.title: Best Beach Towns in Spain for Summer 2025
blog_articles.excerpt: From Costa Brava to Mallorca, these Spanish beach destinations are perfect for a 5–7 night escape.
blog_articles.content: Spain’s coastline offers something for everyone: family-friendly resorts on the Costa del Sol, lively nightlife in Barcelona, and relaxed coves in Mallorca. We highlight the top beach towns and explain how to choose the right pre-built package for July 2025.

blog_articles.title: Non-Stop Weekend: LAX to New York City in 3 Days
blog_articles.excerpt: Flying from LA to NYC for a quick escape? Here’s how to pick the right non-stop flight and hotel bundle.
blog_articles.content: We outline a simple 3-day New York itinerary plus step-by-step tips to search for non-stop LAX–JFK flight + hotel bundles, filter by total price, and pick the best Midtown hotel for a short stay.

blog_articles.title: Complete Guide to Visiting the Vatican Museums
blog_articles.excerpt: Everything you need to know before stepping into the Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel.
blog_articles.content: We explain ticket options, the best times to visit, dress codes, and how to combine the Vatican Museums with a Rome city tour. Includes sample time slots that pair well with our Custom Trip Builder itineraries.

blog_articles.title: Florence vs. Venice: Which City to Visit on a Short Trip?
blog_articles.excerpt: Can’t fit both Florence and Venice into your itinerary? We help you pick the right city—or combine them.
blog_articles.content: We compare Florence and Venice on museums, food, romance, and accessibility, and show how to use our Custom Trip Builder to add 2 nights in each city for a 6-night Italy itinerary.

blog_articles.title: Ultimate Carry-On Packing List for Budget Travelers
blog_articles.excerpt: Avoid checked bag fees and still pack everything you need for a two-week trip.
blog_articles.content: From compressible packing cubes to refillable toiletry bottles, we share a minimalist packing list that works for most climates and airlines, plus tips on traveling light with kids.

blog_articles.title: How to Use Our Custom Trip Builder for Multi-City Itineraries
blog_articles.excerpt: Step-by-step instructions for creating and saving your own multi-city itineraries in Italy and beyond.
blog_articles.content: We walk you through adding cities, adjusting nights, selecting 3-star hotels, and attaching guided tours like Rome city walks or Venice canal boat tours, then saving everything under a custom itinerary name.

blog_articles.title: Top Free Museums Around the World
blog_articles.excerpt: Traveling on a budget? These world-class museums won’t cost you a cent to enter.
blog_articles.content: From London’s British Museum to Washington D.C.’s Smithsonian, we list 20 incredible museums with free entry, plus tips on finding free museum days in cities like Paris and Tokyo.

blog_articles.title: Traveling with Kids: Finding Family-Friendly Hotels
blog_articles.excerpt: Look for these key filters—like free breakfast and Wi-Fi—when booking hotels with children.
blog_articles.content: We show you how to filter for family-friendly properties, understand room occupancy rules, and pick amenities that actually matter with kids, like breakfast, Wi-Fi, and free cancellation.

blog_articles.title: Understanding Airline Fare Classes and Upgrades
blog_articles.excerpt: What do all those letters on your ticket mean, and how do they affect changes, refunds, and miles?
blog_articles.content: We break down fare classes, basic economy vs. regular economy, and when it’s worth paying more for flexibility. Includes tips for finding non-stop flights within your budget.

packages.title: Swiss Alps Ski Adventure - 7 Nights
inclusions: 7 nights in a ski-in/ski-out chalet hotel

packages.title: Tokyo & Kyoto Cultural Highlights - 7 Nights
inclusions: 4 nights in Tokyo, 3 nights in Kyoto (3-4 star hotels)
Guided city tours in Tokyo and Kyoto

packages.title: Greek Island Hopping Adventure - 7 Nights

Observation deck ticket (Top of the Rock or Empire State Building)

packages.title: Amalfi Coast Hiking & Food Adventure - 6 Nights
inclusions: 6 nights in a 3-4 star hotel in Sorrento or Amalfi
Guided hikes including the Path of the Gods
packages.description: Combine coastal hikes with authentic Italian food experiences along the Amalfi Coast.

tours.title: 7-Day Classic Japan Highlights (Tokyo, Kyoto & Nara)
tours.shortDescription: A balanced 7-day guided tour covering Tokyo, Kyoto, and a day trip to Nara by bullet train.
tours.description: This small-group guided tour is perfect for first-time visitors to Japan. Spend three nights in Tokyo, three in Kyoto, and enjoy a guided day trip to Nara. Services include city tours, select entrance fees, and assistance using Japan’s efficient rail network. Choose from budget, standard 3-star, or 4-star hotel options.

tours.title: 7-Day Budget Tokyo Stay with Day Trips
tours.shortDescription: Spend a week in Tokyo with optional guided day trips to Nikko or Kamakura.
tours.description: Ideal for independent travelers on a budget, this 7-day package includes centrally located budget or standard 3-star accommodation in Tokyo and a welcome orientation. Add optional guided day trips and activities as you go.

tours.title: 5-Day Tokyo Cherry Blossom Essentials
tours.shortDescription: Capture Tokyo’s sakura season with guided neighborhood walks and park visits.
tours.description: Timed for peak cherry blossom, this 5-day guided trip includes a mix of city sightseeing and flower-filled parks, plus expert photo tips from your guide.

tours.title: 10-Day Grand Japan Explorer with Hiroshima
tours.shortDescription: A comprehensive guided itinerary visiting Tokyo, Hakone, Kyoto, and Hiroshima.
tours.description: See Japan’s highlights in depth with comfortable 4-star hotels, luggage transfers, and guided visits in each city. Optional upgrade to luxury ryokan stays is available.

tours.title: 4-Day Rome City Break with Vatican
tours.shortDescription: Short Rome break including Colosseum and Vatican Museums with skip-the-line access.
tours.description: Stay three nights in central Rome and enjoy two guided tours: Ancient Rome and the Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel. Free time built in for gelato and piazza people-watching.

tours.title: 6-Day Florence & Tuscany Wine Country
tours.shortDescription: Split your time between Florence and the Tuscan countryside with winery visits and art highlights.
tours.description: This guided tour includes museum passes in Florence and two full-day excursions to Tuscan vineyards with tastings and lunch.

tours.title: 6-Day Venice & Dolomites Escape
tours.shortDescription: Combine Venice’s canals with mountain scenery on a relaxed guided itinerary.
tours.description: Spend three nights in Venice and two in a Dolomites mountain village, with guided walking tours and a scenic alpine drive.

tours.title: 7-Day Costa Brava Beaches & Villages
tours.shortDescription: Base yourself on the Costa Brava with day trips to medieval villages and coves.
tours.description: Includes round-trip transfers from Barcelona, a coastal hike, and a boat excursion to secluded beaches, plus plenty of free time.

tours.title: 7-Day Best of Andalusia: Seville, Granada & Córdoba
tours.shortDescription: Discover Moorish palaces, flamenco, and tapas on a guided circuit through Andalusia.
tours.description: Guided visits to the Alhambra, Mezquita, and Seville’s cathedral are included, along with selected dinners and a flamenco show.

tours.title: 3-Day Paris Museums & Food Highlights
tours.shortDescription: Hit the Louvre, Musée d’Orsay, and Paris’s tastiest neighborhoods in one long weekend.
tours.description: Includes skip-the-line museum tickets, a guided food tour of the Latin Quarter, and a Seine cruise, with flexible hotel choices.

tours.title: 4-Day New York City Highlights
tours.shortDescription: See the essential sights of NYC with a mix of guided touring and free time.
tours.description: Includes a guided orientation tour, observation deck ticket, and public transit tips, plus centrally located accommodation.

tours.title: 5-Day Greek Islands Sailing Adventure
tours.shortDescription: Island-hop by sailboat with a small group and skpper-guided itinerary.
tours.description: Sleep on board a modern yacht while visiting quiet bays and fishing villages. No sailing experience required.
